---
description: "Apply the project comment style guide to one or more files. Use when section headers, annotation tags, or lesson header comments need to be updated to match the current conventions."
agent: "agent"
---

Review and update all comments in the target files to comply with [comment-style.instructions.md](../instructions/comment-style.instructions.md).

Apply changes in this order:

1. **Section headers** — replace any old-style banner labels with `SECTION:` / `PURPOSE:`. Replace any old-style sub-headers with `SUBSECTION:` / `PURPOSE:`.
2. **Annotation tags** — ensure all tags (`TODO`, `FIXME`, `NOTE`, `HACK`) are uppercase with a colon and a space before the description.
3. **Lesson header comments** — update any `index.html` or `input.css` lesson headers to match the current HTML or CSS template in the instruction file.
4. **General formatting** — fix spacing after comment markers, capitalization of the first word, and trailing punctuation.

Edit only comments. Do not change any code, markup, or style declarations.
